offer: For accounting firms managing 10–20 clients, manual data entry causes cash flow gaps. We automate cash flow forecasting instead of manual spreadsheet calculations.
problem: Inaccurate cash flow forecasts due to manual data entry.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for accounting firms
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on workflows
DM outreach to accounting firms with demo video
Participate in community forums for tool sharing
try_it: Let users try weekly cash flow reports via email.
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a demo video of the manual workflow
Conduct 10 short user interviews for feedback
Provide early-access onboarding for first users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow saving common inputs as templates
Set default reminder schedules for users
Enable CSV import for existing data
Reduce onboarding steps for new users
